Active Clubs

Discover the vibrant hack clubs across Kerala. Each club is led by high schoolers, for high schoolers. Find one near you or start your own!

Start Your Own Club

Hack Club Kochi

Kochi, Kerala

A growing community of makers in the heart of Kochi. We host weekly build sessions.

View Club Details

Trivandrum Makers

Trivandrum, Kerala

The first hack club in the capital. Shipping cool projects every week.

View Club Details

Calicut Hackers

Calicut, Kerala

A vibrant community of high schoolers exploring technology and creativity.

View Club Details
Hack Club Kerala

A community of high schoolers in Kerala building and shipping cool things. Part of the global Hack Club network.
